name: ipgeolocation-io-mcp
description: Official MCP server for IP geolocation, IP security, abuse contacts, ASN, timezone, astronomy, and user-agent parsing.
long_description: Official MCP server from ipgeolocation.io. Provides 16 tools for IP geolocation, IP security, abuse contact lookup, ASN data, timezone lookups and conversions, astronomy data, and user-agent parsing. Supports free and paid API plans. Bulk operations use a default cap of 1,000 items per request in this MCP server.

tools.name: lookup_ip
tools.description: IP geolocation lookup for any IPv4/IPv6 address or domain

tools.name: bulk_lookup_ip
tools.description: Bulk IP geolocation for up to 1,000 IPs per MCP request

tools.name: get_my_ip
tools.description: Returns the caller's public IP address

tools.name: lookup_company
tools.description: Organization using an IP vs. ASN holder comparison

tools.name: lookup_currency
tools.description: Currency and country metadata for any IP

tools.name: lookup_network
tools.description: BGP route prefix, connection type, and anycast detection

tools.name: check_security
tools.description: VPN, proxy, Tor, and bot detection with threat scores

tools.name: bulk_security_check
tools.description: Bulk security check for up to 1,000 IPs per MCP request

tools.name: get_timezone
tools.description: Timezone lookup by IANA name, coordinates, IP, or airport code

tools.name: get_astronomy
tools.description: Sunrise, sunset, moonrise, moonset, twilight, and moon phases

tools.name: get_astronomy_time_series
tools.description: Daily astronomy data for a date range up to 90 days

tools.name: parse_user_agent
tools.description: Parse a user-agent string into device, browser, OS details

tools.name: bulk_parse_user_agent
tools.description: Bulk parse up to 1,000 user-agent strings per MCP request

tools.name: lookup_asn
tools.description: ASN details with peers, upstreams, downstreams, and WHOIS

tools.name: get_abuse_contact
tools.description: Abuse contact email, phone, and address for any IP

api_key.title: API Key
api_key.description: Your ipgeolocation.io API key. Get one free at https://app.ipgeolocation.io/signup
